title: Divine Mercy Novena
description: A nine-day Catholic devotion to Divine Mercy.

days.title: Day 1
days.body: Today bring to Me all mankind, especially all sinners, and immerse them in the ocean of My mercy.

days.title: Day 2
days.body: Today bring to Me the souls of priests and religious, and immerse them in My unfathomable mercy.

days.title: Day 3
days.body: Today bring to Me all devout and faithful souls, and immerse them in the ocean of My mercy.

days.title: Day 4
days.body: Today bring to Me those who do not believe in God and those who do not yet know Me.

days.title: Day 5
days.body: Today bring to Me the souls of those who have separated themselves from My Church.

days.title: Day 6
days.body: Today bring to Me the meek and humble souls and the souls of little children.

days.title: Day 7
days.body: Today bring to Me the souls who especially venerate and glorify My mercy.

days.title: Day 8
days.body: Today bring to Me the souls who are detained in purgatory.

days.title: Day 9
days.body: Today bring to Me souls who have become lukewarm and immerse them in the abyss of My mercy.
